---
title: "EFSA Format"
subtitle: "Data format of the EFDA reporting tool on trace elements"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
th {
  white-space: nowrap;
}
```

The page presents the the data format of the EFDA reporting tool necessary for submitting the background sediment data.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

readMe <- tribble(
  ~`Field Label`,     ~`Field Name`,                               ~Description,                                                                                      ~Catalogue,   ~Optionality,
  "sampleId",         "Sample Identifier",                         "Sample identification according to the data provider.",                                           NA,           "Mandatory",
  "recId",            "Record Identifier",                         "Automatically generated unique identifier by concatenation of sample identifier and speciation.", NA,           "Mandatory",
  "envComp",          "Environmental Compartment",                 "Select the compartment in which the sample was collected.",                                       "envComp",    "Mandatory",
  "pristineLoc",      "Pristine Location",                         "YES/NO if area sampled was affected by pollution.",                                              "yesNo",      "Mandatory",
  "sampleLocGC",      "Sampling Location Geographical Coordinates","Latitude and longitude in decimal degrees.",                                                      NA,           "Mandatory",
  "sampleLocCM",      "Sampling Location Country, Municipality",   "Country and municipality of sampling location.",                                                  NA,           "Mandatory",
  "sampleDate",       "Sampling Date",                             "Date of sample collection.",                                                                      NA,           "Mandatory",
  "traceEl",          "Trace Element",                             "Trace element measured.",                                                                         "traceEl",    "Mandatory",
  "spec",             "Speciation",                                "Oxidation state of the trace element.",                                                           "spec",       "Mandatory",
  "conc",             "Measured Concentration",                    "Analytical result of concentration.",                                                             NA,           "Mandatory",
  "methAn",           "Method of Analysis",                        "Method used to measure concentration.",                                                           "methAn",     "Mandatory",
  "unit",             "unit",                                      "Unit of the relevant data element.",                                                              "unit",       "Mandatory",
  "weight",           "Expression of product",                     "Dry weight or wet weight.",                                                                       "weight",     "Dependent Mandatory",
  "LOD",              "Limit of Detection",                        "Limit of detection.",                                                                             NA,           "Optional",
  "LOQ",              "Limit of Quantification",                   "Limit of quantification.",                                                                        NA,           "Optional",
  "accLab",           "Accredited Laboratory",                     "YES/NO if laboratory is accredited.",                                                             "yesNo",      "Optional",
  "phSed",            "pH of porewater of the Sediment",           "Measured pH of porewater in sediment.",                                                           NA,           "Optional",
  "TextureSedClay",   "Texture of the Clay Sediment",               "Clay fraction (% dw).",                                                                           NA,           "Optional",
  "TextureSedSilt",   "Texture of the Silt Sediment",               "Silt fraction (% dw).",                                                                           NA,           "Optional",
  "TextureSedSand",   "Texture of the Sand Sediment",               "Sand fraction (% dw).",                                                                           NA,           "Optional",
  "ocSed",            "Organic Content of the Sediment",           "Organic matter in sediment (% dw).",                                                              NA,           "Optional",
  "phWater",          "pH of Water",                               "Measured pH of water.",                                                                           NA,           "Optional",
  "hardWat",          "Hardness of Water",                         "Water hardness category.",                                                                        "hardWater",  "Optional",
  "DOC",              "Dissolved Organic Carbon of Water",         "Dissolved organic carbon (mg/L).",                                                                NA,           "Optional",
  "publicData",       "Data publicly available",                   "YES/NO if data are publicly available.",                                                          "yesNo",      "Optional",
  "refPublication",   "Reference to the published data",           "Reference to publication.",                                                                       NA,           "Optional",
  "comments",         "Comments",                                  "Open comments field.",                                                                            NA,           "Optional"
)

readMe <- readMe %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      where(is.character),
      ~replace_na(.x, "")
    )
  )

readMe <- readMe %>% 
  mutate( Catalogue = ifelse( Catalogue != "", paste0("<a href='#", Catalogue, "'>", Catalogue, "</a>"), "" ) )

envComp <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`,          ~`Term Code`,          ~Description,                                               ~Note,
  "soil",                "A16PE",               "Land",                                                     "Group covering the samples for analysis of different types of lands and grounds.",
  "freshwater",          "A0F7G",               "Naturally occurring freshwater",                            "Freshwater excluding sea- and brackish water.",
  "freshwater sediment", "A198T#F34.A0F7G",     "Sediment, HOST-SAMPLED = Naturally occurring freshwater", "Naturally occurring solid material transported by natural forces.",
  "marine sediment",     "A198T#F34.A16YY",     "Sediment, HOST-SAMPLED = Seawater",                        "Naturally occurring solid material transported by natural forces."
)

yesNo <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~`Term Code`,
  "No",         "N",
  "Yes",        "Y"
)

traceEl <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~`Term Code`,
  "Co",         "RF-00000161-CHE",
  "Cu",         "RF-00000167-CHE",
  "I",          "RF-00000050-CHE",
  "Mn",         "RF-00000176-CHE",
  "Mo",         "RF-00000179-CHE",
  "Se",         "RF-00000184-CHE",
  "Zn",         "RF-00000205-CHE"
)

spec <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~`Term Code`,
  "Co (Total)", "RF-00000162-CHE",
  "Co(+II)",    NA,
  "Co(+III)",   NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "Cu (Total)", "RF-00000168-CHE",
  "Cu(+I)",     NA,
  "Cu(+II)",    NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "I (Total)",  "check CAS number, ECHA",
  "I(-I)",      "RF-00000310-NTR",
  "iodide",     NA,
  "I(+I)",      NA,
  "I(+III)",    "RF-00000049-CHE",
  "Iodates",    NA,
  "I(+V)",      NA,
  "I(+VII)",    NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "Mn (Total)", "RF-00000177-CHE",
  "Mn(+II)",    NA,
  "Mn(+IV)",    NA,
  "Mn(+VI)",    NA,
  "Mn(+VII)",   NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "Mo (Total)", "RF-00000180-CHE",
  "Mo(+IV)",    NA,
  "Mo(+VI)",    NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "Se (Total)", "RF-00000186-CHE",
  "Se(-II)",    NA,
  "Se(+II)",    NA,
  "Se(+IV)",    NA,
  "Other",      NA,
  "Zn (Total)", "RF-00000206-CHE",
  "Zn(+II)",    NA,
  "Other",      NA
)

spec <- spec %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      where(is.character),
      ~replace_na(.x, "")
    )
  )

unit <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~`Term Code`, ~`Data Element (Field Label)`,
  "mg/kg",      "G061A",      "conc",
  "ng/kg",      "G077A",      "conc",
  "%",          "G138A",      "conc",
  "mol",        "G119A",      "conc",
  "mmol",       "G115A",      "conc",
  "%",          "G138A",      "conc",
  "%",          "G138A",      "ocSed",
  "mg/L",       "G062A",      "DOC"
)

weight <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~`Term Code`, ~Note,
  "dw",         "B002A",      "Dry matter, dry weight",
  "ww",         "B001A",      NA
)

hardWater <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`, ~Description,
  "Soft",       "0–60 mg CaCO3/L or 0–0.6 mmol/L or 0–3.37 dGH",
  "Moderate",   "61–120 mg CaCO3/L or 0.61–1.20 mmol/L or 3.38–6.74 dGH",
  "Hard",       "121–180 mg CaCO3/L or 1.21–1.80 mmol/L or 6.75–10.11 dGH",
  "Very hard",  "≥181 mg CaCO3/L or ≥1.81 mmol/L or ≥10.12 dGH"
)

methAn <- tribble(
  ~`Term Name`,     ~`Term Code`, ~Note,
  "ICP-MS",         "F064A",      "Inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry",
  "ICP-AES",        "F057A",      "Inductively coupled plasma atomic emission spectroscopy",
  "FAAS",           "F350A",      "Flame atomic absorption spectrometry",
  "ETAAS (GFAAS)",  "F054A",      "Electrothermal atomic absorption spectrometry",
  "WD-XRFS",        "F832A",      "Wavelength Dispersive X-Ray Fluorescence Spectroscopy",
  "IC-UV/VIS",      "F833A",      "Ion Chromatography UV/VIS detection",
  "HPLC-ICP-MS",    "F029A",      "High performance liquid chromatography ICP-MS",
  "GC-ICP-MS",      "F366A",      "Gas Chromatography ICP-MS",
  "Other",          NA,           NA
)

```

## Report on Trace Elements {#efsa-report}

The details of EFSA submission and their objectives are described in this [call](https://www.efsa.europa.eu/en/call/call-data-determination-natural-background-concentrations-trace-elements-co-cu-i-mn-mo-se-or) from EFSA.

*   **Data on** natural background concentrations of trace elements (cobalt, copper, iodine, manganese, molybdenum, selenium, and zinc)
*   **Trace element concentrations** in marine sediment along the coasts of EU, EFTA, and EU candidate countries (including fjords and estuaries)
*   **Samples collected** within the last 15 years (2009 to present)
*   **Samples from** pristine areas (defined as areas unaffected by point or diffuse pollution sources)
*   **Supporting metadata** regarding porewater pH, sediment texture (% clay <2 µm, % silt 2–63 µm, % sand >63 µm), and organic matter content (%)

## Column Format

```{r}
knitr::kable( readMe, escape = FALSE )
```


## Catalogue Data

### envComp {#envComp}

```{r}
envComp
```

### yesNo {#yesNo}

```{r}
yesNo
```

### traceEl {#traceEl}

```{r}
traceEl
```

### spec {#spec}

```{r}
spec
```

### methAn {#methAn}

```{r}
methAn
```

### unit {#unit}

```{r}
unit
```

### weight {#weight}

```{r}
weight
```

### hardWater {#hardWater}

```{r}
hardWater
```
